duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ، الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ، مَالِكِ يَوْمِ الدِّينِ
duas.translation: All praise is due to Allah, Lord of the worlds, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful, Sovereign of the Day of Recompense.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ كُلُّهُ، وَلَكَ الْمُلْكُ كُلُّهُ، وَبِيَدِكَ الْخَيْرُ كُلُّهُ، وَإِلَيْكَ يُرْجَعُ الْأَمْرُ كُلُّهُ
duas.translation: O Allah, to You belongs all praise, to You belongs all dominion, in Your hand is all good, and to You all affairs return.

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ، وَتَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ، وَتَعَالَى جَدُّكَ، وَلَا إِلَهَ غَيْرُكَ
duas.translation: Glory is to You, O Allah, and praise is to You. Blessed is Your name, exalted is Your majesty, and there is no deity worthy of worship besides You.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ السَّمَوَاتِ وَرَبَّ الْأَرْضِ وَرَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، رَبَّنَا وَرَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ، فَالِقَ الْحَبِّ وَالنَّوَى
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of the heavens and the earth and the Great Throne, our Lord and the Lord of everything, Cleaver of the seed and the kernel.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ الْمَلِكُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، أَنْتَ رَبِّي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي وَاعْتَرَفْتُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي ذُنُوبِي جَمِيعًا
duas.translation: O Allah, You are the King, there is no deity but You. You are my Lord and I am Your servant. I have wronged myself and confessed my sin, so forgive all my sins.

duas.arabic: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ أَسْتَغِيثُ
duas.translation: O Ever-Living, O Self-Sustaining, by Your mercy I seek help.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِأَنَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدَ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ، الْمَنَّانُ، يَا بَدِيعَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You by virtue that all praise is due to You, there is no deity but You alone, without partner, the Bestower, O Originator of the heavens and the earth.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا لَكَ الْحَمْدُ مِلْءَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَمِلْءَ الْأَرْضِ وَمِلْءَ مَا شِئْتَ مِنْ شَيْءٍ بَعْدُ
duas.translation: O Allah, our Lord, to You is all praise, filling the heavens and the earth and whatever else You will.

duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
duas.translation: There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي ظُلْمًا كَثِيرًا، وَلَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، فَاغْفِرْ لِي مَغْفِرَةً مِنْ عِنْدِكَ وَارْحَمْنِي، إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ
duas.translation: O Allah, I have greatly wronged myself and no one forgives sins but You. So grant me forgiveness and have mercy on me.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَإِسْرَافَنَا فِي أَمْرِنَا وَثَبِّتْ أَقْدَامَنَا وَانْصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
duas.translation: Our Lord, forgive us our sins and our transgressions, establish our feet firmly, and give us victory over the disbelieving people.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لَنَا وَلِإِخْوَانِنَا الَّذِينَ سَبَقُونَا بِالْإِيمَانِ وَلَا تَجْعَلْ فِي قُلُوبِنَا غِلًّا لِلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا
duas.translation: Our Lord, forgive us and our brothers who preceded us in faith, and put not in our hearts resentment toward those who have believed.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي خَطِيئَتِي وَجَهْلِي وَإِسْرَافِي فِي أَمْرِي، وَأَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنِّي
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive my mistake, my ignorance, and my excess in my affairs, for You know better than I.

duas.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ، إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيمُ
duas.translation: My Lord, forgive me and accept my repentance, for You are the Accepter of Repentance, the Most Merciful.

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا وَبِحَمْدِكَ، اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي
duas.translation: Glory is to You, O Allah, our Lord, and praise is to You. O Allah, forgive me.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي مَا قَدَّمْتُ وَمَا أَخَّرْتُ، وَمَا أَسْرَرْتُ وَمَا أَعْلَنْتُ، وَمَا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنِّي
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive me what I have done before and what I will do after, what I have concealed and what I have declared, and what You know better than I.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي ذَنْبِي كُلَّهُ، دِقَّهُ وَجِلَّهُ، وَأَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ، وَعَلَانِيَتَهُ وَسِرَّهُ
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive me all my sins, the small and the great, the first and the last, the public and the private.

duas.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ الْعَظِيمَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيَّ الْقَيُّومَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
duas.translation: I seek forgiveness from Allah the Almighty, whom there is no deity but Him, the Ever-Living, the Self-Sustaining, and I repent to Him.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.translation: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا اصْرِفْ عَنَّا عَذَابَ جَهَنَّمَ إِنَّ عَذَابَهَا كَانَ غَرَامًا
duas.translation: Our Lord, avert from us the punishment of Hell. Indeed, its punishment is ever enduring.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ وَمَا قَرَّبَ إِلَيْهَا مِنْ قَوْلٍ أَوْ عَمَلٍ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ وَمَا قَرَّبَ إِلَيْهَا مِنْ قَوْلٍ أَوْ عَمَلٍ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for Paradise and what brings me closer to it of speech and deed, and I seek refuge in You from the Fire and what brings me closer to it of speech and deed.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا إِنَّنَا آمَنَّا فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.translation: Our Lord, indeed we have believed, so forgive us our sins and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

duas.arabic: رَبِّ أَدْخِلْنِي مُدْخَلَ صِدْقٍ وَأَخْرِجْنِي مُخْرَجَ صِدْقٍ وَاجْعَلْ لِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ سُلْطَانًا نَصِيرًا
duas.translation: My Lord, cause me to enter a sound entrance and to exit a sound exit, and grant me from Yourself a supporting authority.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَأَدْخِلْهُمْ جَنَّاتِ عَدْنٍ الَّتِي وَعَدْتَهُمْ وَمَنْ صَلَحَ مِنْ آبَائِهِمْ وَأَزْوَاجِهِمْ وَذُرِّيَّاتِهِمْ
duas.translation: Our Lord, admit them to gardens of perpetual residence which You have promised them and whoever was righteous among their fathers, their spouses, and their offspring.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْفِرْدَوْسَ الْأَعْلَى مِنَ الْجَنَّةِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for the highest Paradise (Al-Firdaws).

duas.arabic: رَبِّ ارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا
duas.translation: My Lord, have mercy upon them (my parents) as they brought me up when I was small.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ يَوْمَ يَقُومُ الْحِسَابُ
duas.translation: Our Lord, forgive me and my parents and the believers on the Day when the account is established.

duas.arabic: رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِي أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ الَّتِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَى وَالِدَيَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صَالِحًا تَرْضَاهُ
duas.translation: My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents, and to do righteousness of which You approve.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ جَمِيعًا
duas.translation: Our Lord, forgive me, my parents, and all the believers altogether.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive me and my parents, and have mercy on them as they raised me when I was small.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ، وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, suffice me with what You have permitted instead of what You have forbidden, and enrich me by Your grace from needing anyone else.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ السَّمَوَاتِ السَّبْعِ وَرَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، رَبَّنَا وَرَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ، أَنْتَ الظَّاهِرُ فَلَيْسَ فَوْقَكَ شَيْءٌ
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of the seven heavens and the Great Throne, our Lord and Lord of everything, You are the Most High and there is nothing above You.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا أَنْزِلْ عَلَيْنَا مَائِدَةً مِنَ السَّمَاءِ تَكُونُ لَنَا عِيدًا لِأَوَّلِنَا وَآخِرِنَا وَآيَةً مِنْكَ
duas.translation: Our Lord, send down to us a table spread from heaven, that it may be for us a festival for the first of us and the last of us, and a sign from You.

duas.arabic: رَبِّ إِنِّي لِمَا أَنْزَلْتَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍ فَقِيرٌ
duas.translation: My Lord, indeed I am in need of whatever good You send down to me.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَغْنِنِي بِالْعِلْمِ، وَزَيِّنِّي بِالْحِلْمِ، وَأَكْرِمْنِي بِالتَّقْوَى، وَجَمِّلْنِي بِالْعَافِيَةِ
duas.translation: O Allah, enrich me with knowledge, adorn me with forbearance, honor me with piety, and beautify me with well-being.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا وَهَبْ لَنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ
duas.translation: Our Lord, let not our hearts deviate after You have guided us and grant us from Yourself mercy. Indeed, You are the Bestower.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي وَسَدِّدْنِي
duas.translation: O Allah, guide me and make me steadfast.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا فِتْنَةً لِلْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ وَنَجِّنَا بِرَحْمَتِكَ مِنَ الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
duas.translation: Our Lord, make us not a trial for the wrongdoing people, and save us by Your mercy from the disbelieving people.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ يَا مُقَلِّبَ الْقُلُوبِ ثَبِّتْ قَلْبِي عَلَى دِينِكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, Turner of hearts, make my heart steadfast upon Your religion.

duas.arabic: رَبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
duas.translation: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْهُدَى وَالتُّقَى وَالْعَفَافَ وَالْغِنَى
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for guidance, piety, chastity, and contentment.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَرِنَا الْحَقَّ حَقًّا وَارْزُقْنَا اتِّبَاعَهُ، وَأَرِنَا الْبَاطِلَ بَاطِلًا وَارْزُقْنَا اجْتِنَابَهُ
duas.translation: O Allah, show us the truth as truth and grant us to follow it, and show us falsehood as falsehood and grant us to avoid it.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
duas.translation: Our Lord, grant us from our spouses and our offspring comfort to our eyes and make us a leader of the righteous.

duas.arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ ذُرِّيَّةً طَيِّبَةً إِنَّكَ سَمِيعُ الدُّعَاءِ
duas.translation: My Lord, grant me from Yourself a good offspring. Indeed, You are the Hearer of supplication.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ حُبَّكَ وَحُبَّ مَنْ يُحِبُّكَ وَالْعَمَلَ الَّذِي يُبَلِّغُنِي حُبَّكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for Your love and the love of those who love You, and the deed that will bring me to Your love.

duas.arabic: رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِي أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ الَّتِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَى وَالِدَيَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صَالِحًا تَرْضَاهُ وَأَصْلِحْ لِي فِي ذُرِّيَّتِي
duas.translation: My Lord, make me grateful for Your favor upon me and my parents, and to do righteous deeds pleasing to You, and make my offspring righteous.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being in this life and the next.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اشْفِنِي شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
duas.translation: O Allah, cure me with a cure that leaves no illness behind.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَذْهِبِ الْبَأْسَ رَبَّ النَّاسِ، وَاشْفِ أَنْتَ الشَّافِي، لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ، شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
duas.translation: O Allah, remove the hardship, O Lord of mankind, and heal, for You are the Healer. There is no healing except Your healing, a healing that leaves no disease behind.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي دِينِي وَدُنْيَايَ وَأَهْلِي وَمَالِي
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for well-being in this life and the next. O Allah, I ask You for forgiveness and well-being in my religion, my worldly life, my family, and my wealth.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْبَرَصِ وَالْجُنُونِ وَالْجُذَامِ وَمِنْ سَيِّئِ الْأَسْقَامِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from leprosy, madness, mutilation, and from evil diseases.

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ يُبْرِيكَ، وَمِنْ كُلِّ دَاءٍ يَشْفِيكَ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, He cures you, from every disease He heals you, and from the evil of the envier when he envies.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and grief, and I seek refuge in You from incapacity and laziness.

duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ الْعَظِيمُ الْحَلِيمُ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ رَبُّ السَّمَوَاتِ وَرَبُّ الْأَرْضِ
duas.translation: There is no god but Allah, the Great, the Forbearing. There is no god but Allah, Lord of the Great Throne. There is no god but Allah, Lord of the heavens and the earth.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَحْمَتَكَ أَرْجُو فَلَا تَكِلْنِي إِلَى نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ، وَأَصْلِحْ لِي شَأْنِي كُلَّهُ
duas.translation: O Allah, I hope for Your mercy, so do not entrust me to myself even for a blink of an eye, and rectify all my affairs.

duas.arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
duas.translation: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no deity but He. In Him I put my trust, and He is the Lord of the Majestic Throne.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا، وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزَنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلًا
duas.translation: O Allah, there is no ease except what You make easy, and You make the difficult easy if You wish.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْجُبْنِ وَالْبُخْلِ، وَالْهَرَمِ وَعَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from incapacity, laziness, cowardice, miserliness, senility, and the punishment of the grave.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكَسَلِ وَالْهَرَمِ وَالْمَأْثَمِ وَالْمَغْرَمِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from laziness, senility, sin, and debt.

duas.arabic: إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ، اللَّهُمَّ أْجُرْنِي فِي مُصِيبَتِي وَأَخْلِفْ لِي خَيْرًا مِنْهَا
duas.translation: Indeed, to Allah we belong and to Him we shall return. O Allah, reward me in my affliction and replace it with something better.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, and I seek refuge in You from the trial of the False Messiah.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعِلْمَ النَّافِعَ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعِلْمِ الَّذِي لَا يَنْفَعُ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, and I seek refuge in You from knowledge that does not benefit.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ، وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ
duas.translation: Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest. Glory to Him Who has subjected this to us, for we could never have done it by ourselves. And indeed, to our Lord we will return.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ فِي سَفَرِنَا هَذَا الْبِرَّ وَالتَّقْوَى، وَمِنَ الْعَمَلِ مَا تَرْضَى، اللَّهُمَّ هَوِّنْ عَلَيْنَا سَفَرَنَا هَذَا
duas.translation: O Allah, we ask You in this journey of ours for righteousness and piety, and deeds that please You. O Allah, make this journey easy for us.

duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
duas.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي بِنِعْمَتِهِ تَتِمُّ الصَّالِحَاتُ
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah, by whose blessing all good things are completed.

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ، سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ
duas.translation: Glory is to Allah and praise is to Him. Glory is to Allah the Almighty.

duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
duas.translation: I seek refuge with Allah from the outcast Shaytan.

duas.arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
duas.translation: There is no power and no strength except with Allah.

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ عَلَى نَفْسِي وَدِينِي وَأَهْلِي وَمَالِي
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, upon my soul, my religion, my family, and my wealth.

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, with Whose name nothing on earth or in heaven can cause harm, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

duas.arabic: رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبًّا، وَبِالْإِسْلَامِ دِينًا، وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ نَبِيًّا
duas.translation: I am pleased with Allah as my Lord, with Islam as my religion, and with Muhammad as my Prophet.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَصْلِحْ لِي دِينِي الَّذِي هُوَ عِصْمَةُ أَمْرِي، وَأَصْلِحْ لِي دُنْيَايَ الَّتِي فِيهَا مَعَاشِي
duas.translation: O Allah, rectify my religion which is the safeguard of my affairs, rectify my worldly life in which is my livelihood.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْهُدَى وَالتُّقَى وَالْعَفَافَ وَالْغِنَى
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for guidance, piety, chastity, and self-sufficiency.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، وَمِنْ عَذَابِ النَّارِ، وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, from the punishment of the Fire, and from the trial of life and death.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ زَوَالِ نِعْمَتِكَ، وَتَحَوُّلِ عَافِيَتِكَ، وَفُجَاءَةِ نِقْمَتِكَ، وَجَمِيعِ سَخَطِكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the removal of Your blessing, the change of Your well-being, the suddenness of Your punishment, and all of Your wrath.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْبُخْلِ وَالْكَسَلِ وَالْجُبْنِ وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْهَرَمِ وَعَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from miserliness, laziness, cowardice, stinginess, senility, and the punishment of the grave.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْجُبْنِ وَالْبُخْلِ، وَالْهَرَمِ وَالْقَسْوَةِ وَالْغَفْلَةِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from incapacity, laziness, cowardice, miserliness, senility, hardness of heart, and heedlessness.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنَ الْخَيْرِ كُلِّهِ عَاجِلِهِ وَآجِلِهِ، مَا عَلِمْتُ مِنْهُ وَمَا لَمْ أَعْلَمْ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for all that is good, immediate and future, what I know and what I do not know.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِعِلْمِكَ الْغَيْبَ وَقُدْرَتِكَ عَلَى الْخَلْقِ، أَحْيِنِي مَا كَانَتِ الْحَيَاةُ خَيْرًا لِي، وَتَوَفَّنِي إِذَا كَانَتِ الْوَفَاةُ خَيْرًا لِي
duas.translation: O Allah, by Your knowledge of the unseen and Your power over creation, keep me alive as long as life is good for me, and cause me to die when death is good for me.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدِّينِ وَالدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being in my religion, my worldly life, and my Hereafter.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ فِعْلَ الْخَيْرَاتِ، وَتَرْكَ الْمُنْكَرَاتِ، وَحُبَّ الْمَسَاكِينِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You to do good deeds, to abandon evil deeds, and to love the poor.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ حُبَّكَ وَحُبَّ مَنْ يُحِبُّكَ، وَحُبَّ عَمَلٍ يُقَرِّبُنِي إِلَى حُبِّكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for Your love, the love of those who love You, and the love of deeds that bring me closer to Your love.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ وَمَا قَرَّبَ إِلَيْهَا مِنْ قَوْلٍ أَوْ عَمَلٍ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for Paradise and whatever brings me closer to it of speech and action.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ جَارِ السَّوْءِ فِي دَارِ الْمُقَامَةِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from an evil neighbor in the abode of residence.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ مُنْكَرَاتِ الْأَخْلَاقِ وَالْأَعْمَالِ وَالْأَهْوَاءِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from evil character, evil deeds, and evil desires.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَدْمِ وَالتَّرَدِّي وَالْغَرَقِ وَالْحَرِيقِ وَالْهَرَمِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from being crushed, falling, drowning, burning, and senility.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الشِّقَاقِ وَالنِّفَاقِ وَسُوءِ الْأَخْلَاقِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from discord, hypocrisy, and bad manners.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, help me to remember You, to thank You, and to worship You well.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ طَهِّرْنِي مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ وَالْخَطَايَا، اللَّهُمَّ نَقِّنِي مِنْهَا كَمَا يُنَقَّى الثَّوْبُ الْأَبْيَضُ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ
duas.translation: O Allah, purify me from sins and errors. O Allah, cleanse me from them as a white garment is cleansed from dirt.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِرِضَاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ، وَبِمُعَافَاتِكَ مِنْ عُقُوبَتِكَ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in Your pleasure from Your wrath, and in Your pardon from Your punishment, and I seek refuge in You from You.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ يَا اللَّهُ بِأَنَّكَ الْوَاحِدُ الْأَحَدُ الصَّمَدُ، الَّذِي لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ، وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You, O Allah, that You are the One, the Only, the Eternal, Who begets not nor was He begotten, and there is none comparable to Him.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آمَنَّا بِمَا أَنْزَلْتَ وَاتَّبَعْنَا الرَّسُولَ فَاكْتُبْنَا مَعَ الشَّاهِدِينَ
duas.translation: Our Lord, we have believed in what You revealed and have followed the messenger, so record us among the witnesses.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذْنَا إِنْ نَسِينَا أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا، رَبَّنَا وَلَا تَحْمِلْ عَلَيْنَا إِصْرًا كَمَا حَمَلْتَهُ عَلَى الَّذِينَ مِنْ قَبْلِنَا
duas.translation: Our Lord, do not impose blame upon us if we forget or make a mistake. Our Lord, and lay not upon us a burden like that which You laid upon those before us.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا فِتْنَةً لِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا رَبَّنَا إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ
duas.translation: Our Lord, make us not a trial for those who disbelieve, and forgive us, our Lord. Indeed, You are the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

duas.arabic: رَبِّ اجْعَلْ هَذَا الْبَلَدَ آمِنًا وَاجْنُبْنِي وَبَنِيَّ أَنْ نَعْبُدَ الْأَصْنَامَ
duas.translation: My Lord, make this city secure and keep me and my sons away from worshiping idols.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
duas.translation: Our Lord, grant us from our spouses and our offspring comfort to our eyes and make us a leader of the righteous.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
duas.translation: Our Lord, accept from us. Indeed, You are the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً وَهَيِّئْ لَنَا مِنْ أَمْرِنَا رَشَدًا
duas.translation: Our Lord, grant us from Yourself mercy and prepare for us from our affair right guidance.

duas.arabic: رَبِّ لَا تَذَرْنِي فَرْدًا وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الْوَارِثِينَ
duas.translation: My Lord, leave me not solitary, for You are the best of inheritors.

duas.arabic: رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي
duas.translation: My Lord, expand for me my chest and ease for me my task.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ أَنَبْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
duas.translation: Our Lord, upon You we have relied, and to You we have returned, and to You is the destination.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا لا تَجْعَلْنَا مَعَ الْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ
duas.translation: Our Lord, do not place us with the wrongdoing people.

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنَا وَسَقَانَا وَجَعَلَنَا مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ
duas.translation: All praise is to Allah Who fed us, gave us drink, and made us Muslims.

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةَ
duas.translation: All praise is to Allah Who fed me this and provided it to me without any power or strength from me.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيمَا رَزَقْتَنَا وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.translation: O Allah, bless us in what You have provided us and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

duas.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
duas.translation: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
duas.translation: All praise is to Allah Who gave us life after He caused us to die, and to Him is the resurrection.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِاسْمِكَ أَحْيَا وَأَمُوتُ
duas.translation: O Allah, in Your name I live and die.

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي فِي جَسَدِي وَرَدَّ عَلَيَّ رُوحِي وَأَذِنَ لِي بِذِكْرِهِ
duas.translation: All praise is to Allah Who restored my health, returned my soul, and permitted me to remember Him.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ خَلَقْتَ نَفْسِي وَأَنْتَ تَوَفَّاهَا، لَكَ مَمَاتُهَا وَمَحْيَاهَا، إِنْ أَحْيَيْتَهَا فَاحْفَظْهَا
duas.translation: O Allah, You created my soul and You take it in death. Yours is its death and its life. If You keep it alive, protect it.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِي الْمَدِينَةِ وَفِي ثِمَارِنَا وَفِي مُدِّنَا وَفِي صَاعِنَا
duas.translation: O Allah, bless us in our city, in our fruits, in our measures, and in our weights.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اقْسِمْ لَنَا مِنْ خَشْيَتِكَ مَا تَحُولُ بِهِ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَ مَعَاصِيكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, apportion for us such fear of You as will come between us and acts of disobedience to You.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْجُوعِ فَإِنَّهُ بِئْسَ الضَّجِيعُ، وَمِنَ الْخِيَانَةِ فَإِنَّهَا بِئْسَتِ الْبِطَانَةُ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from hunger, for it is an evil companion, and from treachery, for it is an evil inner trait.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الشُّحِّ وَالْجُبْنِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَرَمِ وَأَرْذَلِ الْعُمُرِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from stinginess and cowardice, and I seek refuge in You from senility and the worst of old age.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ سَمْعِي، وَمِنْ شَرِّ بَصَرِي، وَمِنْ شَرِّ لِسَانِي، وَمِنْ شَرِّ قَلْبِي
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the evil of my hearing, the evil of my sight, the evil of my tongue, and the evil of my heart.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ غَلَبَةِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الْعَدُوِّ وَشَمَاتَةِ الْأَعْدَاءِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from being overcome by debt, from being overcome by the enemy, and from the gloating of enemies.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ النَّارِ وَعَذَابِ النَّارِ، وَفِتْنَةِ الْقَبْرِ وَعَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the trial of the Fire and the punishment of the Fire, and from the trial of the grave and the punishment of the grave.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ يَا اللَّهُ بِأَنَّكَ الْوَاحِدُ الْأَحَدُ الصَّمَدُ، أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي ذُنُوبِي
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You, O Allah, that You are the One, the Only, the Eternal, to forgive my sins.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ جِبْرِيلَ وَمِيكَائِيلَ وَإِسْرَافِيلَ، فَاطِرَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ، أَنْتَ تَحْكُمُ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of Jibril, Mika'il, and Israfil, Originator of the heavens and the earth, You judge between Your servants.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ
duas.translation: O Allah, You are my Lord, there is no god but You. You created me and I am Your servant, and I abide by Your covenant and promise as best I can.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الثَّبَاتَ فِي الْأَمْرِ، وَالْعَزِيمَةَ عَلَى الرُّشْدِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for steadfastness in the affair and determination upon guidance.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعِلْمَ النَّافِعَ، وَالرِّزْقَ الطَّيِّبَ، وَالْعَمَلَ الْمُتَقَبَّلَ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, good provision, and accepted deeds.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْجُبْنِ وَالْبُخْلِ، وَالْهَرَمِ وَالْقَسْوَةِ وَالْغَفْلَةِ وَالْعَيْلَةِ وَالذِّلَّةِ وَالْمَسْكَنَةِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from incapacity, laziness, cowardice, miserliness, senility, hardness of heart, heedlessness, poverty, humiliation, and misery.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ، فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَمْلِكُهَا إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You of Your bounty and mercy, for none possesses them except You.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْسِلْنِي مِنْ خَطَايَايَ بِمَاءِ الثَّلْجِ وَالْبَرَدِ، وَنَقِّنِي مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ كَمَا يُنَقَّى الثَّوْبُ الْأَبْيَضُ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ
duas.translation: O Allah, wash me from my sins with water, snow, and hail, and purify me from sins as a white garment is cleansed from dirt.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آمَنَّا فَاكْتُبْنَا مَعَ الشَّاهِدِينَ
duas.translation: Our Lord, we have believed, so record us among the witnesses.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ
duas.translation: O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, as You sent prayers upon Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ فِي قَلْبِي نُورًا، وَفِي لِسَانِي نُورًا، وَفِي سَمْعِي نُورًا، وَفِي بَصَرِي نُورًا
duas.translation: O Allah, place light in my heart, light on my tongue, light in my hearing, and light in my sight.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي مِنَ التَّوَّابِينَ وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنَ الْمُتَطَهِّرِينَ
duas.translation: O Allah, make me among those who repent and make me among those who purify themselves.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ انْفَعْنِي بِمَا عَلَّمْتَنِي وَعَلِّمْنِي مَا يَنْفَعُنِي وَزِدْنِي عِلْمًا
duas.translation: O Allah, benefit me with what You have taught me, teach me what will benefit me, and increase me in knowledge.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا، وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا، وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, good provision, and accepted deeds.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَلِّفْ بَيْنَ قُلُوبِنَا، وَأَصْلِحْ ذَاتَ بَيْنِنَا، وَاهْدِنَا سُبُلَ السَّلَامِ
duas.translation: O Allah, unite our hearts, reconcile our affairs, and guide us to the paths of peace.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ وَالْهَرَمِ وَعَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from incapacity, laziness, miserliness, cowardice, senility, and the punishment of the grave.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for well-being in this world and the Hereafter.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا عَمِلْتُ وَمِنْ شَرِّ مَا لَمْ أَعْمَلْ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done and from the evil of what I have not done.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ أَنَبْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
duas.translation: Our Lord, upon You we have relied, to You we have returned, and to You is the destination.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اسْتُرْ عَوْرَاتِنَا وَآمِنْ رَوْعَاتِنَا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا
duas.translation: O Allah, cover our flaws, calm our fears, and forgive our sins.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اقْسِمْ لَنَا مِنْ خَشْيَتِكَ مَا يَحُولُ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَ مَعَاصِيكَ، وَمِنْ طَاعَتِكَ مَا تُبَلِّغُنَا بِهِ جَنَّتَكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, grant us such fear of You as will come between us and sin, and such obedience as will bring us to Your Paradise.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَيِّبًا نَافِعًا
duas.translation: O Allah, (send) beneficial rain.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ حَوَالَيْنَا وَلَا عَلَيْنَا
duas.translation: O Allah, around us and not upon us.

duas.arabic: مُطِرْنَا بِفَضْلِ اللَّهِ وَرَحْمَتِهِ
duas.translation: We have been given rain by the grace and mercy of Allah.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اسْقِنَا غَيْثًا مُغِيثًا مَرِيئًا مُرِيعًا، نَافِعًا غَيْرَ ضَارٍّ
duas.translation: O Allah, give us a saving rain, wholesome, plentiful, beneficial and not harmful.

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي يُسَبِّحُ الرَّعْدُ بِحَمْدِهِ وَالْمَلَائِكَةُ مِنْ خِيفَتِهِ
duas.translation: Glory is to Him Whom the thunder glorifies with His praise, and the angels out of fear of Him.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَرْسَلْتَ بِهِ الرِّيحَ
duas.translation: O Allah, we seek refuge in You from the evil of what You have sent with this wind.
